title: TMC turmoil LIVE: Mamata attends INDIA bloc meet while TMC cracks
description: INDIA bloc meeting LIVE: Congress chief Mallikarjun Kharge said a total of 25 parties met for the Opposition alliance meeting in Delhi on Monday and took 5 five key decisions. The alliance group has decided to meet more often now, and the next meeting will be held in Hyderabad in August.
